title.en: As for the extradimensional boundary stone, kee...

content.en:
"According to what the Lord of the Moon Realm said, the Transcendent Dimensional Rule Realm must reach the sixth-point realm before it can be regarded as opening up a perfect internal extradimensional realm! However, you can also use some treasures to increase the success rate of breakthrough and the degree of perfection. "

Ye Tian had such a treasure in his hand, that is, the extra-dimensional boundary stone obtained from the main ruins of the Kun Bronze Realm, which was an excellent treasure to assist in breaking through the third realm.

With the assistance of the Extra-Dimensional Boundary Stone, even if he reached the five-point realm of the extra-dimensional rules, he would be able to break through to the third realm one hundred percent, and his foundation was incomparably perfect, condensing the most perfect extra-dimensional realm in his body.

However, Ye Tian doesn't want to break through with a five-point realm, his minimum requirement is a seven-point realm, so that it is truly perfect, relying on some foreign objects to break through, saying that it is perfect, who knows if these extra-dimensional realms are shallow, and there is still a trace of hidden danger if they can't get it right, but the cultivation of these extra-dimensional realms is too low, and they can't be seen at present.

Therefore, he still waited for the extradimensional rules to be raised to the seventy percent realm before breaking through.

As for the extradimensional boundary stone, keep it for your loved ones.

Cultivation could not be improved for the time being, and Ye Tian would focus on comprehending the extradimensional rules next.

However, if he wanted to quickly improve the extradimensional rules, he had to use the multidimensional treasure bottle imitation to absorb the flesh and blood of the second realm extradimensional creatures, so as to condense a better multidimensional essence.

In this way, you can more effectively improve your extra-dimensional rule realm.

As for the flesh and blood of the first realm extradimensional creatures, it was of little use to him.

However, the second realm extradimensional creatures in the Six Thousand Territory and the surrounding territories are very rare, and almost all of them have backers, so they are not so easy to deal with.

Even if he wants to do it, he must not reveal his identity, otherwise it will be very troublesome.

......

Meanwhile.

Blazing Sun Palace.

The two Fourth Realm beings returned, and they borrowed a super-dimensional Dao soldier to deduce the traces of the realm master, and for this purpose, they also sacrificed a super-dimensional realm as energy to urge this super-dimensional Dao soldier.

Outcome.

"How is it possible, why can't you deduce a trace of the Lord of the Moon Realm, she is just a superdimensional realm in the early stage of the third realm, and she has been hit hard, even if there are some treasures on her body that can shield the deduction, but they can't cover our deduction!"

"Unless there is a fourth realm and the cultivation strength is still above us, use the super-level super-dimensional Dao soldiers of the Concealment Deduction to help her cover up. "

"There's also the possibility that she has something special about her that can shield our deductions, but it's very unlikely. Because we could vaguely deduce her traces before, we notified Yandu Tiange to enter the Six Thousand Territory to hunt her down, and in a short period of time, she was hit hard, how could she get such a treasure!"

"There is a high probability that other Fourth Realms have found her, damn it, if other Fourth Realms are involved, we will not be able to obtain the multidimensional treasure bottle in her hand!"

"Let Yandu Heavenly Pavilion continue to track, maybe it's for other reasons, don't give up!"

......

After a long time, there was no news from the Lord of the Moon Realm, and those extradimensional realms in the Six Thousand Territory had completely given up, and even Yandu Heavenly Pavilion had given up, but they were still hanging on to that task, and they didn't pay too much attention to it.

After all, they couldn't even find the fourth realm of the Blazing Sun Palace, and they naturally couldn't find it, and it would be a waste of time if they didn't give up.

And in the following years, Ye Tian occasionally found a lone second realm extradimensional creature.

If the opponent's strength is not strong, he will attack the opponent directly.

However, some second-realm extradimensional creatures are very powerful, even if they can't beat Ye Tian, they have special means to escape.

Therefore, he did not succeed in killing the second realm extradimensional creatures every time, but he also killed many second-realm extradimensional creatures.

Relying on these second-realm extradimensional creatures, his multidimensional treasure bottle imitation condensed a more advanced multidimensional essence, but it took a long time to condense the multidimensional essence, and it almost took five extradimensional epochs to condense the multidimensional essence.

However, for Ye Tian, it is enough for now.

And the fact that he had the imitation of the Duowei Treasure Bottle, the Lord of the Moon Realm naturally didn't know, and the other party didn't even know about Ye Tian's other things, after all, Ye Tian didn't want to expose too many things.

The Terran Temple, a place of retreat.

Ye Tian refined drops of higher-grade multi-dimensional essence, which he called the Second Realm Multi-Dimensional Essence.

Relying on these two-dimensional essences, his extra-dimensional rules improved rapidly. []

In a short period of time, his extra-dimensional rule realm has reached more than 30,000 silks, and according to this efficiency, it won't be long before he can comprehend the super-dimensional rules above 40,000 silks.

However, even if it was a two-dimensional multi-dimensional essence, it was impossible for him to quickly raise his extra-dimensional rules to the seven-point realm.

Unless he can have the real multi-dimensional treasure bottle, and find the flesh and blood body of the third realm, sacrifice it to the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, and condense the multi-dimensional essence of the three realms.

But he can't do that at the moment.

"How much can you improve!"

Ye Tian thought so.

In the blink of an eye, fifty extradimensional epochs had passed.

In these years, the human race has given birth to many transcendent realms of the first realm, and his relatives have all broken through, and with the supply of his resources, his son Ye Xingchen has also broken through to the second realm.

The reason why Ye Xingchen broke through so quickly was naturally because Ye Tian gave him the multi-dimensional essence of the first realm that assisted his cultivation, and let his cultivation break through to the peak of the first realm in a short period of time, coupled with the multi-dimensional essence of the first realm that assisted in comprehending the super-dimensional rules, Ye Xingchen's super-dimensional rule realm was naturally not low, and it was very easy to break through to the second realm.

However, he asked Ye Xingchen to keep a low profile, and not to leave the human race for a short time (Li Haozhao), otherwise the cultivation speed is so fast, it is also very abnormal, and it is still easy to attract the attention of some powerful forces.

And Ye Xingchen has always needed to comprehend the rules of the extradimensional dimension, so he has also responded to it, and has been practicing penance in the Terran retreat.

And in these years, Ye Tian has collected materials for all kinds of medium super dimensional dao soldiers, successfully refined a variety of medium super dimensional dao soldiers, and even refined several second realm spirit puppets.

"The super-dimensional rule realm, forty thousand and three hundred and twenty-six silks, has almost just broken through the four-point realm, and now it is a little difficult to continue to improve quickly, but relying on a large number of second-dimensional multi-dimensional essences, it can also make my super-dimensional rule realm slowly improve, relying on a long time to comprehend fifty thousand silks should be no problem. "

Ye Tian muttered.

But this is already the limit of the imitation of the Duoweibao bottle.

Subsequently, if he wants to continue to improve the extradimensional rules, he will have to rely on other methods.
